channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Yan Liu, Ashleigh Buhai share lead at 63 in the LPGA Tour's JM Eagle LA Championship
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Yan Liu birdied the final three holes in chilly conditions Thursday afternoon for a 9-under 63 and a share of the first-round lead with Ashleigh Buhai in the LPGA Tour's JM Eagle LA Championship.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Florida State sports alumni Brooks Koepka, Jared Verse, others react to deadly campus shooting
item.description: Former Florida State sports stars offered support to their fellow Seminoles after at least two people were killed in an on-campus shooting.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Haley Cavinder gets engaged to Cowboys star shortly after her sister's rumored breakup with Carson Beck
item.description: Former Miami basketball star Haley Cavinder announced Thursday she is engaged to Dallas Cowboys tight end Jake Ferguson after nearly two years of dating.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Man United seals spectacular comeback to beat Lyon 5-4 and advance to Europa League semifinals
item.description: MANCHESTER, England (AP) — Manchester United’s season isn’t done yet. On a night of high drama at Old Trafford, the troubled Premier League club put its domestic problems to one side by sealing a spectacular comeback to beat Lyon 5-4 and advance to the semifinals of the Europa League.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Florida State cancels all on-campus sports events through the weekend after on-campus shooting
item.description: Florida State has canceled all home athletic events through the weekend after an on-campus shooting Thursday left two dead and at least six others injured.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Aaron Donald gets restraining order against woman he says stalks him and thinks they're married: reports
item.description: Three-time Defensive Player of the Year Aaron Donald has reportedly been granted a restraining order against a woman he says believes they are married.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Longtime ‘College GameDay’ face Lee Corso to retire after four-decade run
item.description: Corso, who turns 90 in August, began his popular headgear segment in October 1996 at a game at Ohio State.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Bears announce plans for Chicago NFL draft party at Soldier Field
item.description: The Chicago Bears announced their lineup of activities and entertainment for their NFL draft party on April 24, 2025, at Soldier Field, featuring exclusive on-field access, behind-the-scenes moments, and interactive activities, as well as appearances by current and former Bears players.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Devon Dampier ready to take the reigns
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - As spring practice wraps up this week for the Utah football team, new quarterback Devon Dampier is getting more and more comfortable. It helps having played in new offensive coordinator Jason Beck's system the last two seasons at New Mexico.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Warriors edge Grizzlies in Play-In Tournament thriller, clinch playoff spot
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- The Golden State Warriors are officially going to the 2025 NBA Playoffs after a nail-biting 119-116 win over the Memphis Grizzlies on Tuesday night in San Francisco. The victory sets Golden State (48-34) up with a first-round matchup against the No.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: Utah HC loses to St. Louis in season finale, 6-1
item.description: ST. LOUIS (ABC4 Sports) - The historic inaugural season for the Utah Hockey Club has officially come to an end. Clayton Keller scored his 30th goal of the season, but Utah could not overcome a four-goal barrage in the first period by the Blues in a 6-1 loss.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Popular beach in San Diego County to host surfing in the 2028 Summer Olympics
item.description: All eyes will be on San Diego County's coastline this summer! LA28 recently announced a popular state beach located in North County will set the stage for surfing during the 2028 Summer Olympics in Los Angeles.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Why every MLB player will wear the same number Tuesday
item.description: Every MLB player, regardless of team or position, will be wearing the exact same jersey number on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, Fox 5

item.title: Hear from Masters champion Rory McIlroy and longtime friend Tony Finau
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) -- Rory McIlroy won the Masters yesterday to become the sixth player to complete the career Grand Slam. It was a long time coming for the Irishman -- and nobody was happier for him than Tony Finau, who has known McIlrory for a long time. "It's quite cool.
item.dc:creator: Wesley Ruff, ABC 4

item.title: Chicago Sky select Ajsa Sivka, Hailey Van Lith in WNBA Draft
item.description: The Chicago Sky selected Slovenian stretch four Ajsa Sivka and TCU point guard Hailey Van Lith with their top two picks in the WNBA draft to address their need for perimeter shooting and to bolster their rebounding efforts.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Jazz close out season with 116-105 loss at Minnesota
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS (ABC4 Sports) - The NBA season has mercifully come to an end for the Utah Jazz. The Jazz ended the worst season in franchise history with a 116-105 loss to the Minnesota Timberwolves, who were led by Anthony Edwards with 43 points.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Warriors' playoff seeding set after loss against Clippers in regular-season finale
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- The Golden State Warriors' playoff path is set. They will play in the NBA Play-In Tournament following a home overtime loss to the Los Angeles Clippers in Sunday's regular-season finale. With the loss, the Warriors will face the Memphis Grizzlies on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: Report: Cubs' Justin Steele to undergo elbow surgery, done for the season
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The Chicago Cubs were dealt a heavy blow on the injury front Sunday evening. All-Star starting pitcher Justin Steele is done for the season, according to the Chicago Sun-Times.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Fan reaches into Mike Trout's glove to snatch a catch from Angels outfielder
item.description: A fan grabbed the ball out of Mike Trout's glove after the Los Angeles Angels star reached into the right field stands Saturday night to make what appeared to be a great catch against the Houston Astros
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Game 82: The end of the line for some in the NBA, decision day for others
item.description: Game 82 for every team in the NBA has arrived. For 10 clubs, it's the end of the season. For 13 others, it's one last game before the postseason. And for seven teams in the Western Conference, Game 82 might feel like Game 7.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Local golf club students attend The Masters for first time
item.description: It was a beautiful Friday for the second round of The Masters, and some middle schoolers got to attend the tournament for the first time.
item.dc:creator: Brad Means, Fox 5
